creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
When doing the following items, one can stimulate the route delete / recreate error which ultimately causes failures in sysinstall:

1. Walk through steps to do a normal network-based sysinstall.
2. Cancel install when transferring files (CRTL-C and Retry suffice).
3. Reselect media (FTP).
4. Attempt to complete install.

The `emergency' console will note something of the flavor that the default route doesn't exist.

Please assign to randi@.
